headline: Wells Fargo Maintains an “Overweight” rating on ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON)
summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) is among the 10 Best EV Stocks to Invest In According to Hedge Funds. On June 9, Wells Fargo raised its price target on ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) to $140 from $115. The analyst maintained an “Overweight” rating on the shares. It also noted the emergence of “physical AI,” pointing to […]

headline: ON Semiconductor (ON) Launches GaNEXUS For AI Data Centers And Robotics
summary: ON Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:ON) launched its GaNEXUS gallium nitride power portfolio, targeting AI data centers, robotics, industrial automation, and energy infrastructure. The GaNEXUS line focuses on efficiency, thermal performance, and integration for high power applications. The portfolio extends ON Semiconductor's reach into sectors with demanding power management requirements. ON Semiconductor sits at the intersection of power management and high performance computing hardware, and...
